name: Informed consent event
description: Obtaining and documenting a subject's legally effective informed consent. OSSICRO drafts the consent FORM; the consent EVENT (disclosure, comprehension, voluntary agreement, signature) is a human act between a qualified clinician and the subject and can never be executed by software.

name: IRB review and approval determination
description: The determination that a study, consent document, or amendment satisfies the criteria for approval is the convened (or expedited) IRB's judgment. OSSICRO prepares submission packages and tracks status; it never renders or records an approval on the IRB's behalf.

name: SAE causality / expectedness determination
description: Judging whether a serious adverse event is a suspected adverse reaction (reasonable possibility of causal relationship) and whether it is unexpected is a medical judgment of the qualified physician / medical monitor. OSSICRO computes deadlines and drafts report shells; it never sets causality or expectedness.

name: Form FDA 1571 sponsor signature
description: The sponsor's (or sponsor-investigator's) signature on Form FDA 1571 is a binding legal attestation of the sponsor commitments, including the 30-day wait. Software cannot be a sponsor (21 CFR 312.52) and cannot execute this signature.

name: Form FDA 1572 investigator signature
description: The investigator's signature on the Statement of Investigator is a personal, non-delegable commitment to conduct the study per the protocol, Part 50, and Part 56. OSSICRO fills the form; only the named investigator signs it.

name: Financial disclosure certification / disclosure
description: Certification (Form 3454) or disclosure (Form 3455) of financial interests is a personal attestation by each listed investigator under Part 54. OSSICRO pre-populates from structured data; the certifying signature is human.

name: Submission to FDA
description: Transmitting any document to FDA (IND, amendment, safety report, annual report, withdrawal notice) is an explicit human-authorized act of the sponsor/sponsor-investigator. OSSICRO assembles complete, validated packages; it never files.

name: Statistical sign-off
description: Approval of the statistical analysis plan and the statistical content of the clinical study report is the qualified biostatistician's professional judgment. OSSICRO drafts structure and checks pre-specification; it does not sign off analyses.
